contact.department: Department of Computer Graphics and Multimedia

roles.organization: Advanced instrumentation and methods for material characterization
Members of Commissions for State Doctoral Examinations
Members of Commissions for State Final Examinations at FIT
Supervisors in Doctoral Study Programme at FIT

education_and_academic_qualification: doc., Computer Science and Engineering, FIT BUT, 2024
Msc., Computer Science and Engineering, FIT BUT, 2003
career_overview: 2024- Associate professor at DCGM FIT, Brno University of Technology
2020-2025 Head of R&D SW Development, TESCAN 3DIM, s.r.o.
2011-2024 Assistant professor at DCGM FIT, Brno University of Technology
2008-2017 Co-founder & Head of Software Development, 3Dim Laboratory s.r.o.
2003-2011 Assistant lecturer at DCGM FIT, Brno University of Technology
2003-2005 HW Programmer, HEXAGON Systems, s.r.o. (Design and development of a control loading system for the L-139 aircraft simulator)
2001-2003 HW Programmer, Virtual Reality Media, s.r.o., later VR Simulators, s.r.o. (Design of a communication interface between HW and SW modules of the L-159 aircraft full mission flight simulator)
scientific_activities: Image processing and machine vision - 2D/3D image segmentation, deep learning and neural networks, object detection and recognition, 3D shape analysis and 3D reconstruction.
3D data visualization and processing - 3D images, point clouds, 3D meshes, etc.
awards: A good position in the 7th year of the AFCEA student s competition for the best work in the area of information and communication systems 2003

teaching.consulting_hours: Thursday, 15:00-17:00 , B/L225 (Bozetechova 1/2, Brno 61200) In person or online on MS Teams - write me a message for a link to the online reservation of consultation blocks! Appointments at another dates (and during the summer holidays) can be arranged by email.
